en.name: Level 66 — Exhibit
en.shortDescription: An infinite walk-through aquarium of shifting architecture and oppressive darkness that wears down visitors' minds.
en.atmosphere: Deafening silence broken by water sounds; pitch-black humid glass tunnels and a constant sense of being watched by empty tanks.
en.tips: Travel in groups with light sources, count heads often, ignore strange sounds, and leave immediately if you find an emergency door.
